programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Bi De is at a loss after an accident caused Bi An to time travel instead of him. It is now Bi An's turn to feel strange by his surroundings in modern day 2020. Xiao Ping thinks that "Bi De" is behaving strangely after his return.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 13
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) To help Taizhu pay off her debts, Xiangjun takes a role he does not like. Overwhelmed by losses from fraud, Taizhu moves to cheaper housing and refuses the money Xiangjun offers.

programme.title: Three Bold Siblings - EP 14
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zhenshu learns what Taizhu has been going through all these years and immediately realises how much she has suffered in the Jin family. She apologises to Taizhu and resolves to live with her.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 13
programme.desc: Let’s Go Home 3 makes a return, bringing a cross-border journey filled with new emotions and surprises! Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests — including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more — as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: The Witch’s Diner - EP 8
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Zheng Zhen returns to the Witch's Diner and stops Xi Luo from sacrificing herself in an attempt to break the curse placed upon her.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 83
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 13

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 82
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 39
programme.desc: As the final pieces of the conspiracy fall into place, allies who once stood apart unite for a common cause. Roujia, Mu Zhuohua and Liu Yan each make difficult choices that could alter not only their own futures but also the fate of the kingdom itself.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 40
programme.desc: With the dust finally settling, Mu Zhuohua reflects on the path that brought her from an unknown scholar to a respected court official. As old grievances are laid to rest and new hopes emerge, she and Liu Yan discover that the greatest reward is not power, but the freedom to choose their own future.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 283
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 2
programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: Life of Centenarians - EP 1
programme.desc: Delve into the miraculous realm of centennial life! Each life journey could be the spark that ignites the future. Witness the boundless possibilities of life through the stories of 100 centenarians. Join the documentary series 'Life of Centenarians' and explore together the extraordinary lives of these centenarians!

programme.title: Endless Barbecue 2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Adopting a bolder perspective and more expressive storytelling, this season dives deep into streets and alleys to document the barbecue culture and everyday lives of ordinary people. Six episodes, six flavors, capturing the warmth and passion of life amidst the sizzling flames.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 5
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 9
programme.desc: As feelings grow stronger, Ji-hwan finds it increasingly difficult to hide his affection for Eun-ha. Yet memories of his former life leave him wondering whether someone like him deserves a second chance at love.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 10
programme.desc: A childhood memory unexpectedly links Eun-ha to Ji-hwan's forgotten past, uncovering a connection neither of them ever anticipated. As fragments of the truth begin to surface, their growing bond is tested in ways neither could have imagined.

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 1
programme.desc: Modern-day Lian Man'er suddenly finds herself transported into a rural farming village and becomes the daughter of the struggling Lian family. Refusing to accept her new fate, she quickly adapts to village life and begins searching for ways to improve her family's future. A chance encounter with the enigmatic Shen Nuo hints that her journey may be more complicated than she imagined.

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 2
programme.desc: Determined to earn money, Lian Man'er comes up with creative ideas that surprise both her family and the villagers. While trying to win the trust of those around her, she also discovers that old family disputes run far deeper than expected. Shen Nuo quietly observes her every move, intrigued by her unconventional thinking.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 284

As he finds unexpected family warmth, his memory returns, forcing him to choose between betrayal and brotherhood.

programme.title: Rekayasa Cinta Dokter Cantik No Play Play
programme.desc: Angel (Zoe Abbas), who is constantly pressured by her mother to marry, finally takes the practical route by claiming to be the lover of her patient who suffers from amnesia. Angel's two friends disagree with Angel's idea, but ultimately they support her. Angel says she will soon marry a man whose real name is Marcel (Bryan McKenzie) because Angel claims to be Marcel's fiancée before Marcel's amnesia.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 5

However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Rumah Angker Kok Malah Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Fleeing from home to escape an arranged marriage, Celin (Shanice Margaretha) hits the road with her friend. Their journey turns chaotic when they get stuck on a narrow, single-lane road facing a vegetable pickup truck. A fierce shouting match erupts when the truck driver, Dimas (Aditya Zoni), blames Celin for the gridlock. Seeking a place to lay low, Celin and her friend eventually seek shelter in a luxurious, abandoned mansion deep in the forest—unaware of the rumors that the house is deeply ha

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 6
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Gak Bisa Yura Mbaknya Galak Banget
programme.desc: Yura (Djihan Ranti) is a beautiful, sharp-witted corporate professional whose path crosses with Guntur (Masaji Wijayanto), a young man desperately searching for a job. Through a twist of fate, Guntur lands a position as Yura's personal chauffeur. However, their very first ride turns into an absolute disaster, leaving a furious Yura convinced that her new driver is bound to ruin her career.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 32
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

The secret blows up when Bagus and Gerry get into a minor motorcycle collision, exposing the romance to the furious father, who believes his daughter is far too young to date. Complications mount as Bagus tries to court Indri, a beautiful fellow teacher at the school, sparking hypocritical drama that l

programme.title: Maju Sini Alumni Masa Lalu
programme.desc: Desperate to alter history and restore Satria (Kevin Hillers) back to his healthy self, Rena (Vinessa Inez) discovers a magical watch that transports her back to the past. However, as she frantically tries to rewrite their destiny, an unexpected complication arises when another man from that era falls deeply in love with her.

programme.title: VIRUS CINTA CEWEK CINCAU
programme.desc: When the local grass jelly (cincau) vendor is as drop-dead gorgeous as Lala (Masayu Clara), every male customer in the neighborhood instantly catches the 'love virus.' The real question is: will the stubborn, cynical Rendy (Ridho Ilahi) succumb to her charms, or is he immune to the beautiful street vendor?

programme.desc: Mail travels all the way to Jakarta on a desperate mission to locate his missing older brother. While the city feels vast and overwhelming, destiny works in mysterious ways when he unexpectedly crosses paths with Imah—his true soulmate—right at his new workplace.

programme.title: Momen Paling Gemesin Ayam Bahagia
programme.desc: Nindy (Ina Marika) relocates to a quiet village for her medical internship, only to run straight into her past love, Juna (Kevin Hillers). As Nindy uses her medical expertise to care for Juna’s ailing younger sibling, she quickly wins over his entire family. Surrounded by old memories and new gratitude, Juna finds himself falling head over heels for Nindy all over again.

programme.title: Arena Panggang - EP 4
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.title: Biniku Ninja - EP 23
programme.desc: Azlan berasal dari keluarga susah yang akhirnya berjaya merantau ke UK setelah mendapat tawaran menyambung ijazah dalam aliran seni. Kisah bermula apabila beliau berjumpa dengan seorang gadis

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S3 - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara khas untuk anda bersama Dato' AC Mizal.

programme.title: Spontan - EP 2
programme.desc: Komedi yang dipentaskan oleh gabungan pelawak tanahair menampilkan pelbagai isu berkaitan kesilapan yang sering berlaku dalam kehidupan seharian kita.

programme.title: Arena Panas : Pro VS Bro S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bersama barisan atlit handal dan selebriti popular tanah air, sakasikan mereka berentap dalam acara sukan dan permainan menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Sorok - Sorok - EP 13
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 8
programme.desc: Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pakya akan bersembang di Warung sepahtu bersama tetamu undangan mereka.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 11
programme.desc: Istimewa bersama pakar motivasi Samsul Debat dan barisan pelawak, saksikan mereka berkongsi kisah menarik dan lucu bersama penonton.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Kiah The Spy - EP 2
programme.desc: Kiah membina kumpulan baru untuk menguruskan perniagaan Ikan Pekasamnya,dia juga dilatih dan dilantik menjadi seorang ejen rahsia.

programme.title: Makan - EP 20
programme.desc: Meneroka masakan yang lain dari yang lain, memberikan tips mudah ketika di dapur dan membawa anda ke restoran-restoran yang terkemuka di sekitar Kuala Lumpur

programme.title: Arena Panggang - EP 5

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 11
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Kak Lina Ter-Over Take Over - EP 6
programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat Kak Lina Pom Pom yang kecoh dan lucu bersama para tetamu jemputan melakukan cabaran istimewa yang pasti mencuit hati anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Komediri With Douglas Lim - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi berdiri yang dihoskan oleh satu-satunya Douglas Lim yang menampilkan 3 persembahan setiap episod.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2019 - EP 10

programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: RI-OH RIMBA - EP 3
programme.desc: Amir Sisi cabar Hawa, Putera, Ikhmal dan Atu buat cabaran di Kampung Orang Asli?! Macam mana agaknya reaksi mereka dalam Rioh Rimba ni?!

programme.title: Jutawan Ekspres - EP 3
programme.desc: Keluarga miskin berpindah ke kejiranan kaya selepas menjadi jutawan serta merta. Masing-masing cuba untuk hidup sebagai 'orang kaya' mengikut cara mereka sendiri.

programme.title: Kimchi Untuk Awak
programme.desc: Bella, pelajar Malaysia di Korea Selatan memutuskan untuk menghabiskan cuti semesternya di Malaysia. Tetapi hidupnya yang tenang menjadi kucar-kacir selepas terserempak lelaki Melayu-Korea, Daniel Lee.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah program travelog yang menampilkan tiga pelawak popular iaitu Syuk, Sharif Zero dan Mamak Puteh di mana mereka akan mengembara ke luar negara dan meneroka sendiri budaya dan tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 1
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Healing With Zizan - EP 1
programme.desc: Dua selebriti lelaki tanahair yang akan ditemu bual oleh Zizan tentang Hijrah mereka, berkongsi pandangan dan perjalanan rohani mereka tentang apa yang mendorong mereka untuk maju ke hadapan

programme.title: Perang Jantina - EP 5
programme.desc: Pasukan lelaki dan pasukan wanita bersaing antara satu sama lain menyelesaikan tugasan dan cabaran untuk membuktikan jantina mana yang lebih unggul.

programme.title: Next To Neelofa - EP 11

programme.title: Poongodi
programme.desc: Poongodi rises above her father's male chauvinism, intent on proving herself & pursuing a college education. Her path crosses with Saravanan, a naïve young man who blindly trusts his manipulative stepmother. Uncover the fate of the two kindred souls.

programme.title: Thulasi
programme.desc: A powerful tale of two sisters, Thulasi and Thendral, whose bond is tested by betrayal, greed, and dark intentions. United by courage and love, they rise strong to expose the truth in their battle against injustice.

programme.title: VINODHINI
programme.desc: When her husband, a soldier, disappears in a military accident, Vinothini never loses hope, firmly believing he'll come back. Join her inspiring journey as she cares for his family & meets life's hardships as a single mother with resilience & love

programme.title: PUTHU VASANTHAM
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends—Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi—tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Annam

programme.title: Yetili - EP 7
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 8
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi - EP 9
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi - EP 10
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: C'est Mathematique ! Avec Iman - EP 8
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 46
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 11
programme.desc: Fox is far too overconfident, as he takes on the particularly reserved Crow in the fencing event.

programme.title: Belfort Et Lupin - EP 8
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 53
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 34
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 44
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Foot Go - EP 4
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Marocains Du Ciel - EP 4
programme.desc: Abdelwahed, Touria's father, as well as her friend Khadija, struggle to lift Touria's spirits. Professor Noukira, who believed in her, continues his investigation to restore justice.

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: Basik
programme.desc: The programme which explores and explains the economy, examines our relationship to money and analyses our purchasing power. The economic, social and environmental challenges of tomorrow are covered in a direct, down-to-earth and occasionally mischievous manner!

programme.title: A Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. programme.title: Echappees Belles

programme.title: Si On Lisait A Voix Haute 2025

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 25

programme.title: Movie - Dev

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 5
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Rodri, Viktor Gyökeres, Chris Wood and Daniel Munoz.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham. He also opens up about the terrifying plane incident in 1998 that near

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. Now coaching at Chelmsford City, we see a different side to the former hardman as he passes on his experience to the next generation, while reflecting on the moment

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way. Through exclusive interview

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 3
programme.desc: No Australian has made more Premier League appearances than Mark Schwarzer, so who better to decide on the true Australian GOAT from those who have made the journey from Down Under to the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. programme.title: Manchester City vs Liverpool (MW11) - EP 110
programme.desc: Liverpool won this exact fixture 2-0 last season but haven’t won consecutive away league games against Man City since a run of three between 1987 and 1991.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (MW12) - EP 119
programme.desc: Arsenal have won five of their last six Premier League games against Tottenham (D1), including the last three in a row. It’s their longest winning run against Spurs since a five game stretch between January 1987 and January 1989.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Liverpool (MW17) - EP 166
programme.desc: Tottenham have won just two of their last 25 Premier League games against Liverpool (D6 L17), picking up home wins in October 2017 (4-1) and September 2023 (2-1).

programme.title: Arsenal vs Manchester United (MW23) - EP 229
programme.desc: Manchester United are winless in their last six Premier League games against Arsenal (D1 L5) – they’ve never gone seven in a row without a win against the Gunners in their league history.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Manchester City (MW25) - EP 250
programme.desc: Following their 3-0 win at the Etihad in November, Manchester City are looking to complete their first league double over Liverpool since 1936-37, which was also the last time they won consecutive league games against them.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Manchester City (MW24) - EP 239
programme.desc: Tottenham have completed the Premier League double over Manchester City nine times so far, more than they have any other opponent. Meanwhile, only Chelsea (10) have done so more against the Citizens.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Sunderland (MW31) - EP 307
programme.desc: Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle (W7 D3), winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture (Newcastle also 10 between 1985 and 1997).

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Arsenal (MW27) - EP 269
programme.desc: Spurs have lost their last three Premier League home games against Arsenal, as many as they had in their previous 23 (W10 D10). They last lost four in a row against them between 1952 and 1955.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Manchester City (MW32) - EP 319
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last nine Premier League games against Man City (D3 L6) since a 2-1 away win in May 2021.

programme.title: Everton vs Liverpool (MW33) - EP 327
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level (L3).

programme.title: Manchester United vs Liverpool (MW35) - EP 348
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool (D9 L7), though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal (MW33) - EP 329
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal (W7 D3) since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Liverpool (MW11) - EP 110
programme.desc: Liverpool won this exact fixture 2-0 last season but haven’t won consecutive away league games against Man City since a run of three between 1987 and 1991.

programme.title: FS MMA Tama Chan vs. Jan Finney
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Jan "Cuddles" Finney faces off against Tama Chan where Finney looks to put the squeeze on Japan's Tama Chan in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Malignaggi vs. Edner Cherry
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Lightweights Paul 'Magic Man' Malignaggi (21-1, 5 KOs) vs. Edner 'Cherry Bomb' Cherry (21-4, 10 KOs) from the Hammerstein Ballroom in New York, New York, USA on February 17, 2007.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Weapons Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned. The World Karate Federation expects a field of Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League makes its debut in Dubl

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. David Estrada
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a bout to determine a new NABF welterweight champion, as Andre Berto faces David Estrada. Also on the card, kickboxing legends Errol Zimmerman and Daniel Ghita battle to a gruesome end.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 5 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takakeisho, Hokutofuji, Terunofuji and Shimanoumi.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Chris Arreola vs. Jameel McCline
programme.desc: This episode features a Heavyweight title bout between the unbeaten current champ Chris Arreola taking on the hard hitting veteran Jameel McCline, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.desc: This episode features Michael Bisping as he talks about his fame, Dominick Cruz in the announcer's booth and Tito Ortiz shows off his house.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Paris as some of the 2016 Olympics' finest athletes battle for their shot at glory.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Paul Williams vs. Sergio Martinez
programme.desc: Wide World Of Fights includes all styles of fighting from around the world in one show! This episode features the first encounter between Paul Williams and Sergio Martinez, one that ends in a controversial majority decision, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Adrien Broner vs. Jason Litzau
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is then-undefeated Adrien Broner taking on Jason Litzau in a fight that ends with a first-round TKO. Also on the card, action from light welterweight champ Amir Khan.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: American Ninja Warrior travels back to San Jose, California where the top 30 competitors from the Military Qualifier tackle the Military Finals course. In addition to the obstacles from the Military Qualifier, contestants will face Salmon Ladder, Arm Rings, Doorknob Arch and Spider Climb. Top competitors Army National Guard Caption Ryan Stratis, active Navy Lieutenant Junior Grade Dustin McKinney and Coast Guard Aviation Survival Technician Robin Pietschmann will take on the course.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. No worries, the Squirrels can run after him and give it back. They take all sorts of transport to catch Rhodri, and he is always one step ahead. Until finally, they're on a raft across the sea and land right by Rhodri's front door.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 109
programme.desc: Dipsy and Laa‐Laa drive to the Hidey Hup in the Tubby Car. They meet Tinky Winky and Po and the Teletubbies go on the Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are back together like you've never seen them before!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 37
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 15
programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 16
programme.desc: A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 17
programme.desc: Lorenzo decides to play a dangerous trick on his loyal coach Beppe. However, he soon realises that taking the legendary opera star Dame Bella Canto to the music festival wasn't the best idea.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 41
programme.desc: Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 42
programme.desc: Uh oh! Glitch accidently uses his size-ray to shrink the Go Jetters and Ubercorn so that they are the size of ants!

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 43
programme.desc: In this aerial adventure the Go Jetters are on the Strait of Gibraltar, Southern Spain to follow a group of migrating baby stalks as they make their journey from Spain to Africa. The baby birds follow the grown-ups so they know where to go, and then they remember the way for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Tao asks Mojo and Bo to help him film an action-packed snowboarding video, but Mojo is not so steady on the slopes. Which top can they swap to grab the white-hot snow shots?

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Chilli's heat helps Supertato to stop Evil Pea from freezing over the whole supermarket.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: It's a space race to fulfil Carrot's dream of being the first Veggie on the cheese moon.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Supertato and Evil Pea team up to find treasure, but she tricks him to get it for herself.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are ... interesting!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 16
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 17
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping. They need to find somewhere to pitch their tent but it's not as easy as they thought it would be. They all work together and finally get settled. Then things start to unravel when the squirrels hear a scary noise outside the tent. What can it be? All sorts of things are imagined. DUGGEE!!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 18
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 37
programme.desc: Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 39
programme.desc: A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Bird Island in Antarctica to help rescue a grey-headed albatross chick that gets blown off its nest during a storm.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout blast off on a global adventure to Peru, South America, to uncover the stinky secret of a colony of Humboldt penguins living in the desert. Along the way, Andy encounters some boisterous sea lions and tries a bit of crowd surfing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 110
programme.desc: A cloud appears in Teletubbyland and it rains. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa­Laa and Po watch the flowers bloom. Another cloud appears and it rains pink, Tubby Custard!

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are back together like you've never seen them before!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want dad to play two different games, so dad tries to play both at the same time. While also watching the race on TV.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 16

programme.desc: Uh oh! Glitch accidently uses his size-ray to shrink the Go Jetters and Ubercorn so that they are the size of ants!

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 43
programme.desc: In this aerial adventure the Go Jetters are on the Strait of Gibraltar, Southern Spain to follow a group of migrating baby stalks as they make their journey from Spain to Africa. The baby birds follow the grown-ups so they know where to go, and then they remember the way for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 44
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are on Whistler Mountain in Canada doing some skiing and checking out the amazing cable car which runs high up between the mountains.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Tao asks Mojo and Bo to help him film an action-packed snowboarding video, but Mojo is not so steady on the slopes. Which top can they swap to grab the white-hot snow shots?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: It's a space race to fulfil Carrot's dream of being the first Veggie on the cheese moon.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Supertato and Evil Pea team up to find treasure, but she tricks him to get it for herself.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Supertato is determined to rescue Tomato's precious jewel after Evil Pea steals it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 16
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 17
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping. They need to find somewhere to pitch their tent but it's not as easy as they thought it would be. They all work together and finally get settled. Then things start to unravel when the squirrels hear a scary noise outside the tent. What can it be? All sorts of things are imagined. DUGGEE!!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 18
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 19
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 39
programme.desc: A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 41
programme.desc: When Indy and Rusty play Mums and Dads, they can't agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout blast off on a global adventure to Peru, South America, to uncover the stinky secret of a colony of Humboldt penguins living in the desert. Along the way, Andy encounters some boisterous sea lions and tries a bit of crowd surfing.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout jet off in the Explorer to Singapore on a global adventure to help guide a smooth-coated otter family back to the safety of a nearby river.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 4
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part. First, they need to find their talents. After they spend some time searching, Narrator explains that 'finding their talents' means working out what they are good at. So, the Squirrels practise their skills until they are ready to face an audience.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 5
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'crab', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today we see different crabs that can walk sideways, hide, have big claws or are colourful. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.desc: Messy watches his sandcastle get washed away by the pouring rain. Why does it have to rain? He finds out why.

programme.desc: Mojo and Bo need to move a crashed meteor. But every time Mojo goes near the big rock, moving turns to grooving. How can you move a meteor if you can't stop dancing?

programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.desc: Glitch wants to ski, so the Grimbots give Table Mountain a snowy peak, which threatens its rare plants.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 39
programme.desc: Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad, standing on his feet as Dad stomps around the house, controlling everything Bingo does and causing chaos.

programme.desc: The Squirrels stumble upon some of Duggee's old radio equipment and decide to start their own show.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak when Roly inadvertently goes on the run with the world's smelliest cheese, earning their Cheese badges in the process.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about all the amazing things trees do for the creatures who live amongst them, and earn their tree badges in the process!

programme.desc: When the Go Jetters find the Grimbots shipping overripe tomatoes into the Spanish town of Bunol, they put a stop to whatever Glitch is up to - until they find out that the tomatoes were destined for the famous Tomatina Festival, the biggest food fight in the world. Can the Go Jetters fix their own 'glitch' and save the festival?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 21
programme.desc: Alaska's a cool place to watch the salmon run, but Glitch opens a 'fishy taxi service' to help the salmon avoid tricky waterfalls and greedy bears. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.desc: When notorious Diesel hides from the other engines, his plans backfire and he gets a surprise on Sodor.

programme.desc: Sarah's hair keeps getting in her way, so it's time for a trip to the hairdressers.

programme.desc: After their snacks go missing, Sergeant Sarah and Constable Quack are on the trail of a biscuit burglar.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Hattie calls up Stanley to help her make a cake. She doesn't have some of the ingredients. Stanley instead makes them using his ingenious contraptions.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: The children want to make a big dinosaur model so they can learn all about it. They make such a huge dinosaur that they want to take it to the museum to be shown as an exhibit.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: From feeling nervous and shy, to making a million friends! The funny animals chat about all the things they love about school.

programme.desc: There's a family get together when Great Gran Gran comes to visit from St. Lucia. JoJo has a whole day of activities planned, but she learns that it's not what you do that makes a day special, it's who you spend it with.

programme.title: KL Enforcers (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: The Royal Malaysia Police and the Malaysian Maritime Enforcement Agency work together to search for survivors and bodies of the victims in the Banting boat disaster over 36 hours.

programme.title: KL Enforcers (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: The Malaysian Maritime Enforcement Agency is tasked to intercept two ships with illegal immigrants on board. Meanwhile the Forensics unit investigates a shooting incident in the neighbourhood of Bangsar.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 4
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9) - EP 6
programme.desc: The quiet suburb of Haddon Township is turned upside down when a toddler goes missing. Residents band together to search local streets and help detectives reveal an unlikely murderer.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: From the perspective of the person being arrested, viewers get a firsthand understanding of what truly happens once the handcuffs are on and the justice system begins its process.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 7
programme.desc: Two teens under interrogation turn on each other; a suspect attempts a shocking escape from police custody; a husband and wife must answer for their deadly secret; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 8
programme.desc: A farmer shares a terrible secret about two missing people—and her pigs; a confrontation over a parking space turns deadly; a missing person case takes a dark turn; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 6
programme.desc: What begins as an open-and-shut case spins into a full-on investigation when a mother and son are found dead in their home. Was this a murder/suicide, or could someone else have been responsible?

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 5
programme.desc: The town of Alexandria, Louisiana, is rocked when the body of Courtney Coco, 19, is found dumped 200 miles from home in Winnie, Texas.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14) - EP 3
programme.desc: When Lia was ten, she became intrigued by her mother's many collectibles and started going to antique stores and estate sales with her and is where Lia suspects her hoarding compulsion originates.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Exotic animal dealer William 'Wild Bill' Zelenski is accused of murdering his girlfriend's 18-year-old son, Ryelee Manente-Powell, after he stole $27,000 worth of venomous and exotic reptiles.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 4
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade. While one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S5) - EP 4
programme.desc: A violent argument between two men erupts at a busy grocery store. One is shot dead and the other faces a murder charge. With the whole incident caught on CCTV, who will the jury believe was the aggressor?

programme.title: Asia S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: In the heart of Asia lie vast arid lands. These deserts and dry grasslands are so hostile, they push life to the limit. Here, one of the rarest animals on earth, the Gobi Bear, searches desperately for water and bizarre looking long-eared Jerboas use their striking features to catch prey. On the arid grasslands, Pallas Cats need ingenious ways to get close to their prey, Mongolian Gazelles must battle harsh winters and human barriers, and Takhi are terrorised each night by Mongolian wolves.

programme.title: Sue Perkins' Big Adventure: Paris to Istanbul S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: It's journey's end as Sue reaches Istanbul. She has her fortune told, falls in love with Turkish delight and explores the world's largest underground caves.

programme.title: Ben Fogle's Race for the Nile S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ben Fogle and Dwayne Fields head into the heart of Africa, to retrace Livingstone's path and the race for the source of the Nile, facing lions and heat, and exploring the legacy of early expeditions.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy S01 - EP 5

programme.desc: Justine encounters parrots in Kuala Lumpur and orangutans in Semenggoh. Chef Wong serves a delicious Penang classic and then Justine makes popular local dishes like mee kolok and mouth-watering curry puffs.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood Eats Japan S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood continues his culinary journey across Japan. He boards the bullet train, visits Okinawa and gets a cookery lesson from an atomic bomb survivor in Hiroshima.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby S03 - EP 2
programme.desc: Monica Galetti and Giles Coren visit the Scottish Highlands to spend some time working at The Torridon, Britain's most northerly five-star hotel. Its need to balance luxury with self-sufficiency has Monica collecting seaweed for the kitchen and helping to herd Highland cattle. Meanwhile, Giles learns to change toilet seats and joins the staff on their afternoon off for a swim in the beautiful but freezing cold loch.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Greek Job S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: The besties go head-to-head designing two separate spaces. Alan pays tribute to Greek gods with an intellectual reading room, while Amanda embraces AI for a Greek theme.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Greek Job S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: There's no holding back with the last space as Amanda and Alan go all out designing an outdoor kitchen before revealing the transformation of the entire house with a farewell party.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Food Stars: Australia S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Gordon and Janine's rival teams must deliver the ultimate foodie event for 20 reviewers. To win, they must secure top reviews on their atmosphere, entertainment, and menu. The losing team is grilled, and a Food Star is sent home.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15 - EP 1
programme.desc: Dorit has recently filed for divorce and opens up to the ladies about her ex, their children and if she’s ready for a Hot Girl Summer. Kyle is planning Alexia’s wedding and navigating life with Mauricio. Sutton must reassess her friendships in the group after being cut off by her former bestie. A familiar face makes a fashionable entrance at Kyle’s Summer Solstice Party as Kathy arrives with Rachel Zoe.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15 - EP 2
programme.desc: After an evasive conversation at the Summer Solstice party, Boz and Rachel are left wondering about the sincerity of certain friendships. Erika turns to Sutton for support amid a looming lawsuit. Kyle opens up about the ending of her first relationship since separating from her husband. Dorit fights back tears as her divorce takes a toll on her family. New housewife Amanda meets the group at Jennifer Tilly’s racy Sip & Draw party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15 - EP 3
programme.desc: Boz hosts a speed-dating event where Erika struggles while Kyle discusses her separation. Rachel encourages a post-annulment Sutton to move on, and Dorit seeks financial advice from "Money Queen" Amanda.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15 - EP 4
programme.desc: Sutton plans a Sedona trip to showcase her growth. Kathy’s dinner puts Amanda in the hot seat, while Dorit and Kyle navigate their separations. Boz continues her fertility journey, and Erika reveals a new beau.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15 - EP 5
programme.desc: In Sedona, Kyle and Dorit’s rift persists. While Boz and Rachel struggle with the heat, others hike to a vortex. Amanda shares rumors about Sutton’s ex-assistant, and Jennifer Tilly clashes with Sutton.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15 - EP 6
programme.desc: Rachel hosts a psychic party where Sutton and Jennifer Tilly face off. Boz pursues fertility treatments in Nevada. Dorit confronts Amanda about her marriage, only to learn of Amanda’s past tragic loss.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S15 - EP 7
programme.desc: After a tearful departure from Rachel's psychic dinner, Amanda turns to Kyle for support while Dorit maintains she's done nothing wrong.

programme.desc: The tension continues at Dorit and Erika’s birthday dinner as Kyle is pulled into the middle of Amanda and Dorit’s drama.

programme.desc: Dorit sits down with Mauricio in hopes of breaking through to PK. Sutton gets emotional while opening up to her daughter about her name change.

programme.desc: Rachel finally gets her wish with a Hot Girl Summer at a Hamptons club. Kyle and Dorit put their problems aside to enjoy the vibe.

programme.desc: Sutton and Jennifer Tilly weigh in on a new, but all-too-familiar woman from Sutton's past.

programme.desc: Young mother Kelli discovers that husband Ty is secretly married to another woman. Kelli threatens to file charges, but when Ty dies suddenly she suspects he's faked his death and is planning to kill her.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Rachael teaches us how to make an Israeli-inspired, tahini-based yoghurt sauce with harissa, served over charred chicken and family-style pitta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Surf and turf is a great combination, but why not make it even better by serving it with tacos? Rachael shows us how to make the ultimate date-night combo of crab nachos and steak tacos.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6) - EP 84
programme.desc: An overextended Dolmar and his team take on a botched flip. But when delays plague the timeline, he recruits his wife Keisha to help manage the project and sees dollar signs as local house prices soar.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 20
programme.desc: These cooking methods have aged like a fine. Join host Michael Yo for a history lesson in five culinary customs, from Mayan meat-smoking to steaming fish with heat from ancient hot springs.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 1
programme.desc: Five men set out on an eco-journey to Mongolia: leader Kim Seok-hoon, Kwon Yul, Lim Woo-il, Shin Jae-ha and nomad Shaun. With only backpacks, they have a shared mission to 'clean the Earth'.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: My Husband's Other Wife
programme.desc: Young mother Kelli discovers that husband Ty is secretly married to another woman. Kelli threatens to file charges, but when Ty dies suddenly she suspects he's faked his death and is planning to kill her.

programme.title: Murder In Nashville
programme.desc: Eden moves to Nashville and gets swept up in a whirlwind romance with Jax, the son of a wealthy power player in the country-music scene. But things take a turn when other women turn up dead.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Instead of sticking to a single concept, these homes are decorated according to the owner's personal tastes. We'll showcase homes where you can see the ultimate expression of personal style.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 16
programme.desc: Josh Niland, the fish king, surprises all the contestants when he unveils perfectly butchered cuts of beef. He then leads the kitchen in a masterclass on how to butcher a tuna to represent beef cuts.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 17
programme.desc: MasterChef welcomes esteemed author and Yotam Ottolenghi protege Ixta Belfrage for a debut visit that packs a punch. The British chef has brought a Mystery Box bursting with her favourite produce.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 18
programme.desc: Today's pressure test raises the bar, as the contestants are tasked with recreating guest chef Blayne Bertoncello's highly technical dessert, not just once, but in five consistent dishes.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: It's make-your-own-takeout night and Rachael teaches us how to create her version of Khua Kling, a Thai stir-fry dish with ground beef, lime leaf and red curry paste, served with short-grain rice.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 7
programme.desc: Grab your map and your appetite as host Michael Yo sets his sights on the best off-road eats. Buckle up as we hit the backroads for bison burgers in Alabama and Brussels sprouts behind bars in Connecticut.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: Angela has a huge growth on the back of her neck that she fears will ruin her daughter's wedding. Loretta is terrified that her oozing skin condition will get in the way of making her movie.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Chef Deborah makes country captain chicken stew, a flavourful Southern dish with an Indian influence, made with bone-in chicken, curry, tomatoes and coconut milk, served over rice noodles.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 7
programme.desc: Today's homes will focus on "Home Interiors for Families," reflecting the rising popularity of family-orientated designs. We'll be sharing many tips that bring small but certain happiness to your home.

programme.title: Kidnapping In The Grand Canyon
programme.desc: When two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust an experienced hiking guide to bring them on an off-trail adventure, things go south when he takes them captive. They have to fight both man and nature.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 7
programme.desc: James and his team take on a massive seven-bedroom zombie home with a terrible layout and a huge, rotting pool house in the backyard. Partner Andy has brought the project to James, hoping for a big payday.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flooding is rising worldwide, driving a global push for climate adaptation. From tunnels to seawalls to fly farms, can these solutions keep up with accelerating global warming?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: AI’s rapid growth is pushing global energy demand skyward, forcing electrical grids to expand and modernize. Now, companies from China to Nigeria are investing in new tech to power the future.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Liquid Death was founded on the idea of breaking the norms of traditional marketing. We speak to CMO Dan Murphy about the water company's origin as a "sheep in wolf's clothing."

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We speak with Pranav Yadav, CEO of Neuro-Insight, about the marketing intelligence his company is gleaning from neuroscience.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Lisa McKnight, Mattel's chief brand officer, has been at the forefront of reviving the iconic Barbie. Now the famous toy brand has launched itself beyond store shelves and onto the silver screen.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown discusses the technology, data and effort required to propel the McLaren brand onto the modern F1 stage and into living rooms around the globe.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Stephan Pretorious, chief technology officer of WPP, unpacks the world of generative artificial intelligence and its potential impact, both positive and negative, on marketing.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: From immersive experiences to live streaming, National Women's Soccer League Chief Marketing and Commercial Officer Julie Haddon discusses the opportunities for growing women's professional sports.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Jason Kelly follows Pierre Gasly from Alpine Headquarters to a Paris photo shoot to get a firsthand look at how the business of being an F1 driver goes far beyond the track.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Jason Kelly heads to Maranello, Italy, to speak with Ferrari's leadership about the coming regulatory changes for Formula 1 and how Ferrari's racing technology informs the road cars of today.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Miami Grand Prix Managing Partner Tom Garfinkel tackles the complexities of putting on the race, and F1 CEO Stefano Domenicali reveals why it's key to F1's future growth.

programme.title: Power Players S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Williams Team Principal James Vowles and F1 Academy drivers' champion Abbi Pulling show how advanced simulation is shaping the future of Formula 1.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Artificial intelligence has begun to exhibit early signs of agency. Are we on a path to superintelligence? Self destruction? Or is the potential promise and threat of AI being overblown?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Bioacoustics technology and AI are revealing how animals communicate, and may soon allow us to talk to them. What can we learn from wildlife, and should we be talking to the animals at all?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: With the promise of unimaginable computing power, a global race for quantum supremacy is raging. Who will be first to harness this new technological force, and what will they do with it?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Water. Our survival depends on water, yet global reserves are rapidly shrinking. Can technology help secure humanity's future water needs?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 5

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Soon, another billion people will be online. How will these new users embrace this technology to transform their lives, and what will it mean for the rest of the world?

programme.title: Posthuman S1 - EP 1

programme.title: Posthuman S1 - EP 2

programme.title: Posthuman S1 - EP 3

programme.title: Posthuman S1 - EP 4

programme.title: Africa Live

programme.title: Talk Africa

programme.desc: Most Japanese spend about two hours at a tourist attraction. This episode presents an ultimate two‑hour route through the Parthenon, a temple surrounded by ancient Greek ruins and steeped in Greek mythology.

programme.title: With Mother (R)
