programme.title: no art, no life (R)
programme.desc: Self-taught artists are gaining respect globally. In Japan, such artists are making career-defining works, but few art fans or curators know them.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Go! Go! Cook R'n
programme.desc: A dietary education program introducing tips for cooking and knowledge of ingredients while enjoying singing and dancing with humorous animation.

programme.title: Hidden Buddhist Statues Revealed (R)
programme.desc: 2026 marks a rare year when hidden Buddhist images are revealed to the public. Some are unveiled only once every 33 years. Others, kept on sacred mountaintops since the Heian period, are brought down for the first time. This program explores the mysteries behind the unveiling of Buddhist statues in Japan.

programme.title: Documentary: 20 Minutes (R)
programme.desc: A documentary program targeting the younger generation, who are turning away from TV, produced and directed by young creators.

programme.title: Blue & Yellow 10min (R)
programme.desc: As different colors, blue and yellow can make green by getting together, similarly different lives can coexist by helping each other. This is a program to develop the mind of living together.

programme.title: Juden's Beloved Townscape "Sakuragawa, Ibaraki" (R)
programme.desc: In search of towns to fall in love with, we explore the "Judenken" districts, officially designated as Important Preservation Districts for Groups of Traditional Buildings. This time, we visit Makabe, renowned for its Hinamatsuri festival. In a town where a 400-year-old layout survives to this day, we follow three people in their 30s and the dreams they pursue.

This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 61 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Classical Music Club
programme.desc: Enjoy chamber music performed by first-class Japanese musicians as well as chamber orchestra and soloists from overseas.

programme.title: See, Learn, Explore--A Deep Travelogue in Tohoku
programme.desc: Explore the unknown charms of the Tohoku region of northern Japan.

programme.title: The Great Nature "The Birth of the Atlantic Ocean"
programme.desc: Experience marvelous nature that you have never seen before. This program introduces ultimate forms of ‘great nature’ including ground, ocean, and natural phenomena of the earth that existed from 4.6 billion years ago.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Trip to the Origin of Japan
Songs of Our Generation (R)
programme.desc: The music program, hosted by Oizumi Yo, presents the greatest hits of J-pop from the 1960s to the present with high-quality sound and footage.

programme.title: The Fountain of Ancient Wisdom "Otomo Sorin" (R)
programme.desc: The challenges we face today are similar to what our forerunners went through. The program searches for clues to solve problems, utilizing the wisdoms of historical figures.

programme.title: Actor Koyuki and the Fermenting Master, Grandma (R)
programme.desc: Actor Koyuki loves fermented food, visits grandmas throughout Japan who are experts in making fermented foods, and learns recipes for local dishes she wants to pass down for the future generations.

programme.title: Fun with Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. The program also features dance performances of quotes from the world’s great figures, visits schools to interact with children, and introduces classical performing arts and songs, making it enjoyable for both children and adults.

programme.title: Peek-a-boo
programme.desc: Bringing out potential and capability of children aged 0 to 2 years by stimulating their feelings with pictures and sound.

programme.title: With Mother
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: 1-Minute Anime: Songs for SDGs
programme.desc: Let's learn about SDGs while singing along! A selected goal out of 17 will be introduced in each one-minute song with animation.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery
programme.desc: In this program, children around the age of 4 can experience the pleasure of playing with friends, the wonder of life, the joy of doing thigs by themselves, and consideration for others, all while having fun through various discoveries.

programme.title: Nyan-chu! Space! Broadcasting! (R)
programme.desc: Nyan-chu, a cat from the earth, introduces human lives and cultures to the aliens in outer space.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: NHK News 7 (B)
programme.desc: NHK's core news program wrapping up the day's events in an easy to understand way.

programme.title: Today's Close-up
programme.desc: The program flexibly probes into a wide range of topics from the NHK’s unique point of view.

programme.title: Rokkaku Seiji's Nomitetsu Railroad Trip: Kagoshima Main Line, Hisatsu Orange Railway
programme.desc: Actor Rokkaku Seiji, a lover of both trains and good drinks, sets out on a rail journey around the world. At each stop, he wanders through the towns and explores whatever catches his eye. Sit back and enjoy this fun-filled railroad trip, accompanied by the music he personally selects!

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: NHK News 845
programme.desc: Today's latest metropolitan area news and weather information program.

programme.title: News Watch 9 (B)
programme.desc: NHK's mainstay evening news program.

programme.title: The Fountain of Ancient Wisdom "Ingen"
programme.desc: The challenges we face today are similar to what our forerunners went through. The program searches for clues to solve problems, utilizing the wisdoms of historical figures.

programme.title: The Program Director Kawashima's Variety Shows Season 2
programme.desc: This is a variety show where the program director Kawashima Akira selects only the proposals he truly wants to see from among numerous, personality-packed submissions by comedians, and joyfully discusses their pilot versions with his advisers while creating a new TV program.

programme.title: News Commentary
programme.desc: NHK news commentators give their views on current issues.

programme.title: News & Weather
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news and nationwide weather information.

programme.title: International News Report 2026
programme.desc: An international news program providing in-depth report on what is happening around the world. (Dual audio when available)

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Cooking for Beginners
programme.desc: Tips on cooking for beginners.

programme.title: Cooking for Beginners
programme.desc: Tips on cooking for beginners.

programme.title: Cooking for Beginners
programme.desc: Tips on cooking for beginners.

programme.title: Child-Rearing Hints & Tips
programme.desc: Experts give advice to the questions and troubles from viewers about child-rearing.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Yokai
programme.desc: This episode features the aquatic Namikozo, which warns locals in the area of the Enshu-nada Sea of coming changes in the weather by beating its drum to give waves a distinct rumbling tone.

programme.title: Cinematic Journey
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan - in this episode, Kyle Card hikes the newly-designated long trail around majestic Mount Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: A Secret Date: It's late at night, and all are fast asleep when a young man and woman huddle together along the veranda outside of a house and attend to a rooster. What could the pair be up to?

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Robots are garnering attention for their potential in disaster areas. We'll look at the cutting-edge initiatives aimed at further advancing the application of disaster response robots.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Miyamae Yoshiyuki (Fashion designer) visits Kochi. Kochi's Sunday market features around 500 stalls with fixed locations. Miyamae contemplates how communication has contributed to its longevity.

programme.title: Kabuki Kool
programme.desc: From the colourful pleasure quarters of Gion to tense drama in a remote villa to the thrilling climax, kabuki actor Kataoka Ainosuke guides us through the second half of 'Chushingura'.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Hiroshima Ground Zero
programme.desc: When the atomic bomb fell on Hiroshima, 78 people who were within 500 metres of the hypocentre survived - we visualise what happened at ground zero that day based on rare recordings of eyewitnesses.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Mt. Fuji: Climb Japan's Magic Peak
programme.desc: Climb Japan's tallest mountain on a quiet scenic route with the right gear, stay overnight in a traditional mountain hut, pass a mid-mountain crater and head toward the thrilling summit!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: Meet a fish that's all mouth, but incredibly tough too! The 'Alien Fish' is only 20cm long but skilfully uses its large mouth to intimidate all comers - even divers - to protect its humble shell.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Journey
programme.desc: Iwate Prefecture is home to many historic sites which were made to represent Buddhist paradise - catch a glimpse of eternity through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: Story Land
programme.desc: Leading actors take turns as solo storytellers to act and recite traditional folk tales loved in Japan for centuries - watch out for some delightful illustrations too!

programme.title: Texico
programme.desc: Learn programming principles without a computer! Animated characters provide fun and lucid explanations of five core processes: analysis, combination, generalisation, abstraction and simulation.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: We ride in Ibaraki and Tochigi, looking for the bounties of spring. We meet a farming couple growing sweet bell peppers and a motorcycle shop owner who restored a beloved classic model.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Lot 1000: The Place and the People
programme.desc: Redevelopment plans mean that the last building in Lot 1000 in central Sapporo must be demolished - we learn about the past, present and future of this spot while exploring its centuries-long history.

programme.desc: A single bite of anpan, bread filled with sweet bean paste, is sheer joy - born at the end of the samurai era, it has over 150 years of history.

programme.title: Mt. Fuji's Climb to World Heritage
programme.desc: Mount Fuji's bid for World Heritage status faced formidable obstacles, including devastation that would shock any mountain climber - this is the story of a long climb to becoming a cultural treasure.

programme.desc: Ultra-thin noodles and amber broth: this is the story of a people who overcame disaster with their favourite bowl of ramen.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for music from Chameleon Lime Whoopiepie (getting international attention for their free-spirited style) and vocalist Suzuhana Yuko, who fuses rock with traditional Japanese instruments.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: An animated series about a Japanese dog who gets lost in New York City. Charo says 'I want to see my owner again!', and so he starts his adventure to find his way back home.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: There are about 900 service areas along Japan's expressways - some feature aquariums, amusement parks, or hot spring baths as they continue to evolve and fulfil a growing variety of functions.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Yufuin District is known for hot springs. Meme lives at a temple and loves to sunbathe with the chief priest. Mari likes to relax in baskets or on top of manhole covers. Fuku lives at a sake brewery.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Anime Manga Explosion
programme.desc: Anime Manga Explosion features major Japanese anime and manga works that are highly recognised by international fans. Each episode explores the secrets of the works' popularity.

programme.desc: This episode features "Wakey's Door" on hair dryers, "Become an Athlete for three minutes," with karate exercises, and a music performance, "Plants Song." It energises kids.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.desc: Potters Matsubara Emi and Matsushita Ryohei use waste from their island home, bean pods, seashells, and even animal bones, in their work. A deep respect for the island helps them convey its beauty.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: David Bull came to Japan to master the art of woodblock printing - he learned valuable lessons about Japanese culture and that there is more to the works of art than the paper they are printed on.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Data centres, the engines of our digital age, consume vast energy and drive a surge in CO2 emissions that intensify climate risks while powering global connectivity.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Miyamae Yoshiyuki (Fashion designer) visits Kochi. Kochi's Sunday market features around 500 stalls with fixed locations. Miyamae contemplates how communication has contributed to its longevity.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: The team explores a factory in Saitama making globes for educational use and much more besides. See the skill it takes to turn flat maps into spherical globes - and what in the world is an "AR globe"?

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: The world's thinnest washi (traditional paper) is just 0.03 mm thick but tough, and is used to restore cultural artifacts. See Tosa's natural landscape and washi artisans at work, in time-lapse.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with pianist Mine Kawakami - for which she plays exclusive pieces - helps you experience each season.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Robots are garnering attention for their potential in disaster areas. We'll look at the cutting-edge initiatives aimed at further advancing the application of disaster response robots.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture - this episode looks at words related to hair. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese

programme.title: Culture Crossroads

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 1
programme.desc: Modern-day Lian Man'er suddenly finds herself transported into a rural farming village and becomes the daughter of the struggling Lian family. Refusing to accept her new fate, she quickly adapts to village life and begins searching for ways to improve her family's future. A chance encounter with the enigmatic Shen Nuo hints that her journey may be more complicated than she imagined.

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 2
programme.desc: Determined to earn money, Lian Man'er comes up with creative ideas that surprise both her family and the villagers. While trying to win the trust of those around her, she also discovers that old family disputes run far deeper than expected. Shen Nuo quietly observes her every move, intrigued by her unconventional thinking.

programme.title: News Magazine 2026
programme.desc: A weekly programme covering notable news stories from Hong Kong and around the world. It focuses on social issues that matter most to Hong Kong residents and invites people from various sectors to discuss and analyse the underlying causes and developments.

programme.title: Cooking Beauties
programme.desc: Edwin Siu, Bob, and Owen Cheung host the third season of "Cooking Beauties" A group of female celebrities, after hearing the dish name and a brief description of the cooking process, must then prepare a designated dish, maintaining an air of mystery while the male guests try to guess their identities.

programme.title: Hong Kong: Never Too Small
programme.desc: Our host leads viewers to visit both time-honoured and modern shops across four key areas of daily life: clothing, food, housing and transportation. He reveals the shops' operating history, using them to showcase the enduring beauty of "small spaces."

programme.title: Music Money Monster
programme.desc: Music Money Monster challenges ordinary people and celebrities to battle through live singing stages judged solely by a real‑time AI pitch and beat analyzer, turning flawless intonation into instant cash rewards for players and viewers!

programme.desc: In each episode, popular singers are invited as guests, and they select their favourite works, performing with the live band to share their music with fans.

programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: You Are Not Alone Again

programme.title: ChatSAT
programme.desc: Teenagers are keen on trends. Stepping into the era of technology, they are particularly interested in emerging electronic products and popular media. Our hosts collect the newest information from all over the world, sharing their discoveries with viewers each week.

programme.title: The Joy Of Nature
programme.desc: Taiwan's camping destinations are breathtaking! Our hosts embark on a nature-themed healing trip, traversing Nantou, Kaohsiung, Taoyuan and other locations, delving into the Miaoli mountains, trying out forest cabins, luxury campervans, deluxe tents and more!

programme.desc: The story tells of Ji Ying Ying (Tan Song Yun) from the Huahua Dyehouse during the Tang Dynasty. She bravely faces foreign invaders and guards her dyeing techniques. Later, she creatively spreads these methods overseas, becoming the Dyeing Ambassador of T

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 901-950) VVD Mandarin - EP 910
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational valu

programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 15
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 19
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape. The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA).

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 28
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: Wonder Women - EP 9
programme.desc: LAM FEI (Miriam Yeung) is a beautiful, trendy yet cheerful “Wonder Women” housewife. She and her husband, an architect SHEUNG KIM-HUNG (Raymond Wong) and a smart and active son SHEUNG KAI-KAI are living a happy life. LAM FEI has two buddies, a career woman, MAN FUNG-WAH (Alice Chan) and a pretty and wealthy wife MA SEE-LUI (Rebecca Zhu). Each of this trio has her own ideas about romance and encounter different up and down of love

Each of this trio has her own ideas about romance and encounter different up and down of love

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 18
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: The Driving Power - EP 14
programme.desc: MUI (CHENG SIU CHOW, ADAM) is a middle-aged man who has never had a proper job. Throughout his life, he has been relying on his family and living like a playboy. His biggest achievements are marrying a singer, YUNG (YIP TUNG, CECILIA) and raising their daughter CHU (YE MICHELLE). MUI and YUNG love each other very much even after being married for more than 20 years. However, deep down, MUI is still a playboy.

programme.title: Communion - EP 2
programme.desc: After getting divorced, Au Yiu-cho (Kwok Chun On) and Tang Lai-kuen (Alice Chan) operate two restaurants coincidentally called Yuet Tak House in Hong Kong and on the mainland respectively. They never have issues with each other. In 2022, Lai-kuen abruptly returns to Hong Kong to open a branch. She even declares she wants to obtain the rights to the Yuet Tak House trademark through legal channels.

programme.title: Guts of Man - EP 7
programme.desc: TUNG FEI (CHAN KIN FUNG, SAMMUL) ignores his late father’s last will and sneaks out of the Taohua Village, where he grew up, without his sister LAM’s (KOI MING FAI, JOYCE) knowing it. He meets a fisherman’s son SHEUNG FOON (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) on the way. He and FOON travel to the Qiantang River to see the tides. They meet a tycoon’s daughter YING HIU SUET (CHO, MANDY LEE) and FEI falls in love with her at first sight.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 35
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 36
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Comparing to the director's previous Hex. This time, however, the stakes are even higher and the gruesome goings-on even more memorable. It all starts when a noble police detective starts investigating a child killer's claims of an evil spell, then it doesn't let up until the final, bloated, maggot-ridden cadaver falls.

programme.title: Hong Kong Playboys
programme.desc: Sheng is a rich playboy who lives a carefree and fun life with the ladies, until his mother decides that he should get married. Up against other lady killers in his quest to find Miss Right, Sheng must decide what he wants.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Mr Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: A Buddhist monk and Taoist priest put aside their differences to take on vampires that have been struck by lightning and have now become a super powered threat to mankind.

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: Law Or Justice
programme.desc: Lawyer Yip defends a rapist and gets him acquitted. Yip's boyfriend Fong, a police inspector, knows he is guilty and despises Yip for not upholding justice. The victim's sister takes revenge by spiking the rapist's drink but is raped instead. This puts the rapist back in court. Will Yip choose to uphold law or justice this time?

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter's company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: Girl with the Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: An aspiring TV actress gets into hot water when a stolen diamond is hidden in the shoes she bought for a party.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle...

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: Mr. Shi, a secondary PE teacher, accidentally takes a "super pill" invented by the science teacher and gains superpower, turning into Mr. B. He uses his superpower to help the school sports team win the championship and prevent crimes. When the triad is made aware of Mr. B's superpower, they try to gain the super pill for nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover's death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: An old lady died after mysteriously falling off a building and her ghost appears to haunt the place. This freaked out the security guards, who invite ghostbuster Leo and his female assistant to help. In the process, Leo finds out that the old lady was killed by her son and daughter in law. To rest her soul, Leo promises to bring the couple to justice.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Bo Yi's husband is having an affair, so Bo Yi divorces him and joins the "Happy Spinsters Club" set up by her friends. However, she soon finds out that she does not enjoy being single and while sorting out her thoughts, her repentant husband begs her forgiveness. She must now decide on what she truly wants.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey1-Pandora's box
programme.desc: Joker, a carefree bandit leader, learns he is the reincarnation of the Monkey King. As demons and immortals close in, he is drawn into a chaotic, time-bending journey with the mystical Pandora's Box. Caught between past and present, he must choose between destiny and freedom.

programme.title: Look Out, Officer!
programme.desc: Stephen Chow is a delight in this supernatural action comedy, where a murdered police officer returns from beyond the grave to persuade a rookie cop into avenging his death.

programme.title: The Illegal Immigrant
programme.desc: This is a gritty and realistic Chinatown tale about the life of a Chinese illegal immigrant and his journey in New York. He is looking for a fake marriage with a girl so as to gain the right of abode there. Despite all the hardships and misfortunes, he tries to cope with life and reach for his dreams.

programme.title: The Bare-footed Kid
programme.desc: A poor, bare-footed young man from the countryside arrives in the city to work with the friend of his dead father. When their dye shop is burnt down by a local strongman, he decides to fight back to protect all of them and save the shop.

programme.title: Justice, My Foot!
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays Sung, a lawyer who uses any means necessary to help his wealthy clients escape the law. Sung retires to the countryside when urged by his wife, but when Mrs Sung encounters a woman whose husband's death has been covered up by corrupted officials, Sung returns to the court for justice to be served.

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Talented boxer Jia Yang is caught in an underground fight to clear her father's debts. She loses her Olympic aspiration and vanishes from the boxing world. 10 years later, Coach Li Yue is determined to help her honour her father's wish by returning to the ring. As passion and obligation collide, can Jia Yang revive her abandoned boxing dream?

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him...

programme.title: Wusong VS Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song finds out about his sister-in-law's affair with a rich man, Ximen Qing. Qing sets Song up and have him exiled for a year, during which his hapless brother is murdered and cremated. When Song finally returns home, he takes the case to court but the judge brushes it aside and closes it abruptly. Can Song finally avenge his brother's death?

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Mr. Virgin is a romantic comedy about a twenty-nine year-old man Chao Yu-ting (Alfred Chang) who has seemingly been cursed. He becomes paranoid when a Feng Shui expert tells him it will be unlucky for him to marry before the age of thirty... so comical chaos line the days up to his next birthday!

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation...

programme.title: The Magnificent Scoundrels
programme.desc: Conman Sing is forced by a loan shark to team up with another con artist Betty to steal from a luxurious house. When they encounter other conmen who disguise themselves as the house owners to steal the antiques, they pretend to be their rich guests. As both sides know the other's true identity, they join forces to con the loan shark into a trap.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Former world champion boxer Fai meets fiery young fighter Qi in Macau. As he mentors Qi for an upcoming MMA tournament, Fai rekindles his passion for fighting, life, and the people he cares about.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Women's Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Mei's father as an undercover is exposed. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Faithfully Yours
programme.desc: Playboy Hong Kong Barber Happy Chan opens a fashionable new salon, right next to an old-fashioned Shanhainese barber shop. Its owner, Chuk, is furious at this development and starts a quarrel with Chan and his colleagues during the opening ceremony of his new venture Chuk's pretty daughter, Ying, is forced to keep the peace. Chan and his friends all attempt to woo Ying, but end up getting drunk and falling asleep in her bedroom.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Gangster Chen Da Qi rises to the upper echelons of power, but finds himself torn between the love of two women, the murderous plots of the secret service, and the looming threat of war.

programme.title: How to Choose a Royal Bride
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager has arranged for a Minister's daughter Qiong Yao, to become Emperor Kangxi's concubine. However, Qiong Yao escapes in pursuit of freedom in marriage and Kangxi is happy to not go through with the union. When Kangxi travels incognito to Jiangnan, he serendipitously encounters Qiong Yao, who disguises herself as a man...

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing tracks, but is subsequently entangled with loan sharks. Li becomes debt-laden while his sons are harassed by debt collectors, when more heart-wrenching events begin to unfold.

programme.title: Oily Maniac
programme.desc: Famous director Ho Meng-hua, who gave Jackie Chan and Sammo Hung acting breaks in his early kung-fu films, broke new ground with his horror hit Oily Maniac. Based on a true story about a creature that kills people at night and covers them in oil, it stars young actor Danny Lee (aka. Li Hsiu-hsien) as the oily maniac. It was considered so scary that it was censored drastically.

programme.title: West Chamber
programme.desc: The story is based on a famous Chinese opera. A young impoverished scholar, Zhang, is enchanted by Hong, the daughter of an influential family whom he meets in a temple. The young couple faces the threat of separation due to her family's objection, so Hong's maid secretly helps to arrange their rendezvous in the West Chamber!

programme.title: Brave Archer And His Mate
programme.desc: Guo Jing and Huang Rong raise the son of his sworn brother Yang Kang and named him Yang Guo. To prevent Yang Guo from taking revenge for his father's death, Huang Rong bans him from learning martial arts. Yang Guo runs away from home in anger and encounters Ouyang Feng, who teaches him the "Toad Stance" and accidentally unveils his true identity…

programme.title: The Cave of Silken Web
programme.desc: In this third instalment of Shaw Brother's Journey to the West, Monk Tang San Zang is trapped by seven seductive spider spirits who are hell-bent on achieving immortality by eating him! Monkey, Pigsy and Sha Wu Jing have to fight the spider spirits to rescue Monk Tang San Zang.

programme.title: Portrait In Crystal
programme.desc: Tragic deaths in the underworld cause leader "Yama" (Teng Wei-hao) to suspect a portrait in crystal with mysterious powers. He sends Hen Pan (Chen Hung) and Pai Pan (Hung Hsin-nan) to interrogate its creator, martial artist Lung Fei (Pai Piao)...

programme.title: Godfather of Canton
programme.desc: A docker, Lin Si Hai, accidentally saves Commissioner Cheng who then offers him a position in the police force. Lin is smart and soon rises through the ranks through treachery and corruption, before becoming a gangster.

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: The seventh daughter of the Jade Emperor is banished from heaven to live a mortal life as she is very mischievous. She falls in love with a young village lad Yong, who sold himself to work for the rich so as to bury his father. The goddess sisters help Yong to pay his debt so the lovebirds can be together. Is this going to end happily-ever-after?

programme.title: Disco Bumpkins
programme.desc: This musical comedy is about how a young man Fen, along with his buddy Hamburger, finds love and success in the advertising world.

programme.title: Finger of Doom
programme.desc: The protagonists are ex-swordmasters who now find joy in making umbrellas. They track down the evil Madame Kung Sun and her poisonous "Finger of Doom", a unique supernatural power which allows her to transform normal, everyday people into horrifying zombies, and this is just the start of their mythical adventure against this zombie maker!

programme.title: Inside The Forbidden City
programme.desc: Justice Bao discovers that Consort Li's new born son was swapped at birth and that she was expelled from the palace by Empress Liu twenty years ago. He sets Eunuch Guo up to confess his conspiracy with the Empress. Empress Liu is convicted for her act and Consort Li finally reunites with her son who is now the Emperor.

programme.title: The Flying Dagger
programme.desc: The Yu family and the Green Dragon clan became enemies when the Yu daughter killed the clan head's son, who was a rapist and murderer. The Green Dragon leader wounds the head of the Yu family with his flying daggers, and a wandering swordsman saves the family using his own flying dagger skills. However, his allegiances and motives are unclear.

programme.title: The Mermaid
programme.desc: Zhang and Jin's daughter, Peony, are betrothed at birth but Jin objects to the engagement now. Zhang meets a carp spirit that looks exactly like Peony and they fall in love. When Justice Bao is asked by Jin to distinguish Peony from her replica, he decides to quit the case when he witness the true love between Zhang and the carp spirit.

programme.title: Swordswomen Three
programme.desc: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon could be called "Swordswomen Two." Three decades earlier, Shen Yi, Essie Lin Chia, and Pan Ying-tzu took on Shaw's first international superstar, Lo Lieh for the Han Family Sword - making this a four-star treat for action fans.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: To the tune of the Osmonds hit song, this is a story of adolescent playfulness & innocence lost. Two best friends grow up together and teasingly meet two delightfully impish boys leading to the four to flirtatiously intermingle. However, the innocence of partner swapping eventually leads to a roller-coaster bouts of misunderstood emotions.

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Hu seeks to avenge his father who is being killed by the White-Browed Hermit and his gang. However, he fails in his attempt and is saved by Fang Shi Yu, a youth from Shaolin whose parents are also killed by the same villains. They learn and master the advanced Shaolin style kung fu, before Fang leads Hu and the Shaolin fellows to fight the enemies.

programme.title: Love without End
programme.desc: Singer Qing Qing and architect Peng Nan are a devoted couple. Qing Qing sacrifices herself to help Peng Nan when his family is going through difficulties and is misunderstood by Peng Nan, leading to their break up. When Peng Nan learns the truth and decides to make up with Qing Qing, he finds out that she is suffering from a terminal illness.

programme.title: Five Elements Ninjas
programme.desc: The film is about a Chinese martial arts school finds itself outclassed by their rivals, they hire elite ninja from Japan to destroy the school. The lone survivor of the massacre learns the secrets of ninjutsu and seeks revenge against the ninja.

programme.title: The Enchanting Ghost
programme.desc: It is love beyond the grave, as a young scholar and his beautiful lover are torn apart forever by his dastardly uncle and his friend, who drive the girl to commit suicide... but with death comes revenge for the enchanting ghost. A spooky yet heart-wrenching tale...

programme.title: Killer Constable
programme.desc: Kuei Chih-hung was famous for his modern day crime thrillers, his horror flicks, and even his comedies. But if the only kung-fu film he ever made was this one, he'd still be spoken of with respect by even the most ardent martial arts movie fan. Many consider this real life martial arts champion Chen Kuan-tai's best performance. As a deeply, even obsessively, dedicated Chief Court Constable, he illuminates the screen with fighting skill and emotional passion.

programme.title: Beyond the Great Wall
programme.desc: Wang Zhao Jun refuses to bribe the imperial painter, so he draws an ugly portrait of her, preventing her from being selected by the Emperor until they meet in person. The painter ends up in exile and plots for Wang to marry the Hun's warlord as a revenge. The Emperor rejects this, provoking a war which is only averted when Wang sacrifices herself.

programme.title: Murderer Pursues
programme.desc: Wang Chung was a valued actor long before he became a director, but as a filmmaker, he helped create some of the most interesting thrillers Shaw Brothers ever released - including this fascinating crime saga of a Sino-Vietnamese crime gang. Danny Lee stars as a misunderstood refugee while Ray Lui plays a cop struggling against his own conscience to ensure that justice is upheld.

programme.title: The Black Lizard
programme.desc: Young swordsman Lung Fei encounters strange omens portending the death of his fiancé. His enquiries with the help of Chief Constable Tieh Hu reveal an astounding story, in this tale of men and women struggling to save their true loves.

programme.title: The Bride from Hell
programme.desc: Fang Ming marries the mysterious young lady Leng Qiu Ping, only to discover she is a spirit forced to drain men's life essence. With a Taoist's help, he frees her from an evil force, but their love cannot cross life and death, and they part at dawn in a bittersweet farewell.

programme.title: The Singing Killer
programme.desc: Chiang Yi is blackmailed into a jewellery heist by his former boss who threatens to expose his shady past. Complications arise when Chiang Yi discovers his first love working in the jewellery store.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: A young musician Chi Chiang is hired by the manager of a popular band when the group's drummer/leader Charlie, quits to join a rival group. The new drummer becomes an immediate hit, causing Charlie to be very jealous. Furthermore, the young drummer's mother is dead set against him having a music career.

programme.title: Pursuit
programme.desc: This movie tells the tale of Lin Chong, the Sung Dynasty's Chief Army Instructor who is framed by a corrupt official and has to embark on an exile fraught with danger. Helped by a monk, Lin Chong is finally able to take revenge.

programme.title: Young Lovers
programme.desc: Guitar-playing rich kid, Yang Fan, heads to Japan to join a rock 'n' roll band where he soon finds himself competing for the affections of two beautiful girls.

programme.title: Dirty Ho
programme.desc: Master Wang, who is actually the 11th prince, poses as an antique connoisseur to hide his true identity. When he meets Dirty Ho, a witty con artist, Wang knows he has found the right man to help him untangle a royal succession plot...

programme.title: My Dream Boat
programme.desc: This is a story about the complicated love relationships between a group of young friends who are entangled in a web of love and emotions.

programme.title: The Black Tavern
programme.desc: This sword-filled thriller centres on The Black Tavern - an inn where the down and dirty meet to plot nefarious doings. A bunch of villains are lured to the inn by a rumour about a valuable treasure being hidden there. After all the backstabbing and killings, they realise that it is a trap created to wipe them out once and for all…

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go
programme.desc: Hosted by Sam Tseng and Hsu Nai Lin, this top Taiwan variety show, splits celebrity guests into two teams to battle in various game segments.

programme.title: Chop Chop Show
programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 82
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 39
programme.desc: As the final pieces of the conspiracy fall into place, allies who once stood apart unite for a common cause. Roujia, Mu Zhuohua and Liu Yan each make difficult choices that could alter not only their own futures but also the fate of the kingdom itself.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 40
programme.desc: With the dust finally settling, Mu Zhuohua reflects on the path that brought her from an unknown scholar to a respected court official. As old grievances are laid to rest and new hopes emerge, she and Liu Yan discover that the greatest reward is not power, but the freedom to choose their own future.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 283
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: Ride The Wind 2026 - EP 2
programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: Life of Centenarians - EP 1
programme.desc: Delve into the miraculous realm of centennial life! Each life journey could be the spark that ignites the future. Witness the boundless possibilities of life through the stories of 100 centenarians. Join the documentary series 'Life of Centenarians' and explore together the extraordinary lives of these centenarians!

programme.title: Endless Barbecue 2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Adopting a bolder perspective and more expressive storytelling, this season dives deep into streets and alleys to document the barbecue culture and everyday lives of ordinary people. Six episodes, six flavors, capturing the warmth and passion of life amidst the sizzling flames.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 5
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 9
programme.desc: As feelings grow stronger, Ji-hwan finds it increasingly difficult to hide his affection for Eun-ha. Yet memories of his former life leave him wondering whether someone like him deserves a second chance at love.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 10
programme.desc: A childhood memory unexpectedly links Eun-ha to Ji-hwan's forgotten past, uncovering a connection neither of them ever anticipated. As fragments of the truth begin to surface, their growing bond is tested in ways neither could have imagined.

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 82
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 5
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: Endless Barbecue 2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Adopting a bolder perspective and more expressive storytelling, this season dives deep into streets and alleys to document the barbecue culture and everyday lives of ordinary people. Six episodes, six flavors, capturing the warmth and passion of life amidst the sizzling flames.

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 1
programme.desc: Modern-day Lian Man'er suddenly finds herself transported into a rural farming village and becomes the daughter of the struggling Lian family. Refusing to accept her new fate, she quickly adapts to village life and begins searching for ways to improve her family's future. A chance encounter with the enigmatic Shen Nuo hints that her journey may be more complicated than she imagined.

programme.title: Romance on the Farm - EP 2
programme.desc: Determined to earn money, Lian Man'er comes up with creative ideas that surprise both her family and the villagers. While trying to win the trust of those around her, she also discovers that old family disputes run far deeper than expected. Shen Nuo quietly observes her every move, intrigued by her unconventional thinking.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 284
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: Bath Buddy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A wealthy heir loses his memory in a paragliding accident and is tricked by a bathhouse worker who once clashed with him into becoming his unpaid apprentice. As he finds unexpected family warmth, his memory returns, forcing him to choose between betrayal and brotherhood.

programme.title: Hot Door Night - EP 165
programme.desc: Catch all the fun and laughter right here as we bring you Taiwan's top-grossing variety entertainment show that will keep you wanting for more!

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 15
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: James' Going Places - EP 91
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 16
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven - EP 6
programme.desc: The 7 individuals were all involved in the heated case of a missing girl. As they attempt to escape their fate and pursue the truth, they find themselves embroiled in secrets, lies, and desires in this retribution tale.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 476
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Bath Buddy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A wealthy heir loses his memory in a paragliding accident and is tricked by a bathhouse worker who once clashed with him into becoming his unpaid apprentice. As he finds unexpected family warmth, his memory returns, forcing him to choose between betrayal and brotherhood.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 2
programme.desc: Ning Yuanzhou assembles Yu Shisan, Qian Zhao, Yuan Lu and Sun Lang to escort Prince Yang Ying to An in hopes of bringing home the captive emperor. While investigating matters in An, Ren Ruyi senses that she is being watched, forcing her to question everyone around her.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 10
programme.desc: Long-buried secrets gradually emerge as people connected to the past begin telling different versions of the same story. Faced with conflicting accounts, Ching-lam must decide whom he can truly trust.

programme.desc: The 7 individuals were all involved in the heated case of a missing girl. As they attempt to escape their fate and pursue the truth, they find themselves embroiled in secrets, lies, and desires in this retribution tale.

programme.title: Viva La Romance Season 6 - EP 8
programme.desc: A reality show that delves into couples' conversations, centered on love and understanding. Four couples travel and glean insights from other couples' dynamics, fostering self-reflection, empathy, and marital rejuvenation.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 11
programme.desc: As Hoi Ching-lam edges closer to the truth, he uncovers unexpected links between his brother's past and Shek Ngo-shan's career. While suspicion deepens, Yip Ying-fung warns him that not every answer will bring closure.
